name: 💡 Feature request
about: Suggest a mechanic, biome, item, class, mode, or system
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]

## The idea

<!-- Describe the feature in one paragraph. Assume the reader has played Shattered Pixel Dungeon and Custom Pixel Dungeon but hasn't read our vision doc yet. -->

## Who's it for

<!-- Which player type would love this? Cosmic-horror fans? Roguelike completionists? Casual coop players? People who read every lore book? -->

## How it fits Lutherverse's tone

<!-- Cosmic horror (Junji Ito, Lovecraft) + KH2 + FFX + Bloodborne + Dark Souls + cute pixel-art vibes. Where does your idea land on that spectrum? -->

## How it interacts with the roadmap

<!-- Skim [PROJECT-STATUS.md](../../PROJECT-STATUS.md) for what's planned. Does your idea fit inside an existing sub-project (God/Hard/Bonfire mode, keyblades, sphere grid, coop, cameos, etc.), or is it a new axis? -->

**Fits existing:** <!-- e.g. "extends the sphere-grid system with a node type for..." -->
**New axis:** <!-- e.g. "a whole crafting subsystem we don't have yet" -->
**Collides with:** <!-- If your idea contradicts something in the roadmap, name what — that's just as useful as agreement. -->

## Priority (in your view)

<!-- Not binding on us, but tell us how much you personally want this: -->

- [ ] Nice-to-have, whenever
- [ ] Would move me from watcher to alpha-tester
- [ ] Would make me tell my friends about the project
